# Godot AdMob Editor Plugin
> A high-performance Godot plugin for AdMob integration on Android and iOS.
> Full agent instructions & coding standards: See `AGENTS.md` at the root of this repository.

## Core Architecture
- **GDScript API:** `platforms/godot_editor/addons/admob/admob.gd`
- **C# Bridge:** `platforms/godot_editor/addons/admob/csharp/`
- **Android:** `platforms/android/` (Java/Kotlin, JNI)
- **iOS:** `platforms/ios/` (Obj-C/Swift, SCons/SPM)
- **Docs:** `docs/` (MkDocs)

## Key Files
- `platforms/godot_editor/addons/admob/admob.gd` — Main GDScript API entry point
- `platforms/android/build.gradle` — Android dependencies
- `platforms/ios/Package.swift` — iOS dependencies

## Critical Rules (summary — see AGENTS.md for full details)
- Ad format changes must be synced across GDScript, C#, Android, and iOS.
- Use `:=` in GDScript. No `class_name` in `internal/`. MIT License header on every new file.
- Skip: `.godot/`, `platforms/*/build/`, `.gradle/`, `docs/assets/`.
